strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Hands-on multi-language backend expertise (Node.js, Dlang, Java, C++) with real-time performance focus
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and implementing CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI-agent frameworks or agentic AI systems in production
No visible track record in fintech or regulated environments (e.g., credit systems, compliance)
No evidence of leading teams to 30+ engineers or designing modular multi-agent architectures
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong distributed-systems expertise and engineering leadership, but lacks critical exposure to AI-agent systems, fintech infrastructure, and scaling teams to the required size. Her background aligns more with general software engineering than the specialized agentic-AI fintech domain required for this role.
